config.showFinishedAgents: Display of finished agents: `always` (kept visible, dimmed), `temporarily` (hidden after the retention delay), `never` (active agents only).
config.finishedAgentRetentionSeconds: Delay (in seconds since last activity) before a finished agent is hidden, in `temporarily` mode.
config.inactiveSessionRetentionMinutes: Delay (in minutes since last activity) before an inactive session is hidden. `0` = always show.
